scenarios.name: no_passive
scenarios.description: Aggressive visible fills only. Passive trade-print matching is disabled.

scenarios.name: worse_only
scenarios.description: Passive fills require trade prints through the resting order price. Same-price prints are ignored.

scenarios.name: conservative_queue
scenarios.description: Lower passive conversion, higher queue pressure and conservative product-level overrides.

scenarios.name: harsh_adverse
scenarios.description: Lower passive conversion with extra adverse selection and missed passive fills.
